name: launcher-identity-v1
description: Identity-init Worker — sets Firebase custom claim `stableId` (UUID v4) on first sign-in, persists the uid ↔ stableId binding in Firestore. Spec task-6 F-5 (Phase 4 Track B). Single endpoint POST /init-claim. Two-Worker boundary per DZ-5 — must NOT share state with workers/backup/.
